title: Bungee Cords With Hooks, Heavy Duty Outdoor Elastic Bungee Straps，No odour Industrial Grade bungee rope For Securing Tarps, Luggage, Tents, Bikes or garden tidying 24inch 4Pcs (Black)
features: 【No Odour】Compared to the quantity we pay more attention to the quality of details, the whole rope is made of high quality all latex core and high quality braided rope, away from the chemical smell brought by poor quality rubber and pigment.

【Super Strong Design】 Long-lasting, heavy-duty use with a maximum load capacity of 30kg. Material is high quality full latex core and UV resistant double braided rope with high tensile strength and greater resistance. The heavy-duty wire hook has a plastic protective sleeve that won't rust or stretch out of shape, making it safer. The end knot of the rope at the hook is tied with high temperature treatment to avoid the end of the braided rope falling apart and separating.

【High Strength Elasticity】 Bunjee chords is reinforced with a latex core, greater tensile strength is required when using them than other ordinary elastic cords. This makes them work better for storage belt bundling, protection and connection. The coolest choice for those of you who are looking for quality!

【Reliability】 High temperature, UV and weather resistant. Suitable for outdoor activities in all climatic conditions, the reinforced latex core bungee cord remains flexible and tough no matter what the season, and will not degrade or break.

【Wide Use】Black heavy duty outdoor bungee cord is 1/3 inch (8mm) in diameter and 24 inches/2 feet in length (including hooks), 4 pieces, stretches to 40 inches + with great stretch. The perfect elastic band for cyclists, hikers, travel, camping, barns, gardens and all outdoor activities. It assists with tying, securing, carrying, grabbing and more.
description: Product Description BEXSLE is committed to a product approach where quality is more important than quantity. We believe that practicality and high quality can go hand in hand and we ensure this through the application of rigorous quality control processes. to get the most value out of our products. Heavy duty bungee cords are the perfect elastic band for securing tarpaulins, cycling, hikers, travel, camping, barns, gardens and all outdoor activities. The coolest choice for those who are looking for quality! The whole rope is made up of a high quality full latex core and a high quality braided rope, away from the chemical smell associated with poor quality rubber and pigments. The heavy duty wire hook has a plastic protective sleeve that will not rust or stretch out of shape for greater safety. The high tensile strength and greater resistance require greater tensile strength than other ordinary elastic ropes when used. This makes them work better for storage tape bundling, protection and attachment. Wide range of applications - Black heavy duty outdoor bungee cords have many possible uses such as: tying, securing, carrying, grabbing etc. Oilcloth Binding The bungee is UV resistant and can withstand the worst of outdoor weather. Motorcycle Trip Greater tensile strength. Better strapping, protection. Rubbish bag or bin lid fixing For home or garden organisation and storage. Yoga Mat Carrier, Shelf Barrier, Keep Trash Bags Secure, Prevent Grocery Bag Spills, etc. Many genius ways to use bungee cords for all your travel, yard work, cargo, camping, home storage needs and more. Product features: 3A grade high quality latex core Heavy Duty No Odour High Strength Elasticity Anti-ageing
